creator: ohartman@mail.zedat.fu-berlin.de
text:
While updating due to gettext-updates I run permanently into a full stop of the whole portmaster -r gettext procedure at compiling/updating textproc/gnome-doc-utils:

Making all in doc
gmake[1]: Entering directory `/usr/ports/textproc/gnome-doc-utils/work/gnome-doc-utils-0.20.1/doc'
Making all in gnome-doc-make
gmake[2]: Entering directory `/usr/ports/textproc/gnome-doc-utils/work/gnome-doc-utils-0.20.1/doc/gnome-doc-make'
msgfmt -o de/de.mo de/de.po
if ! test -d de/; then mkdir de/; fi
if [ -f "C/gnome-doc-make.xml" ]; then d="../"; else d="/usr/ports/textproc/gnome-doc-utils/work/gnome-doc-utils-0.20.1/doc/gnome-doc-make/"; fi; \
        mo="de/de.mo"; \
        if [ -f "${mo}" ]; then mo="../${mo}"; else mo="/usr/ports/textproc/gnome-doc-utils/work/gnome-doc-utils-0.20.1/doc/gnome-doc-make/${mo}"; fi; \
        (cd de/ && \
          PYTHONPATH="/usr/ports/textproc/gnome-doc-utils/work/gnome-doc-utils-0.20.1/doc/gnome-doc-make/../../xml2po:/usr/ports/textproc/gnome-doc-utils/work/gnome-doc-utils-0.20.1/doc/gnome-doc-make/../../xml2po:" "/usr/ports/textproc/gnome-doc-utils/work/gnome-doc-utils-0.20.1/doc/gnome-doc-make/../../xml2po/xml2po/xml2po" -m docbook -e -t "${mo}" \
            "${d}C/gnome-doc-make.xml" > gnome-doc-make.xml.tmp && \
            cp gnome-doc-make.xml.tmp gnome-doc-make.xml && rm -f gnome-doc-make.xml.tmp)
  File "/usr/ports/textproc/gnome-doc-utils/work/gnome-doc-utils-0.20.1/doc/gnome-doc-make/../../xml2po/xml2po/xml2po", line 145
    print VERSION
                ^
SyntaxError: invalid syntax
gmake[2]: *** [de/gnome-doc-make.xml] Error 1
gmake[2]: Leaving directory `/usr/ports/textproc/gnome-doc-utils/work/gnome-doc-utils-0.20.1/doc/gnome-doc-make'
gmake[1]: *** [all-recursive] Error 1
gmake[1]: Leaving directory `/usr/ports/textproc/gnome-doc-utils/work/gnome-doc-utils-0.20.1/doc'
gmake: *** [all-recursive] Error 1
*** Error code 1

Stop in /usr/ports/textproc/gnome-doc-utils.

===>>> make failed for textproc/gnome-doc-utils
===>>> Aborting update

Terminated
Terminated
